overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing a horseback ride through the city of Beauclair in Toussaint. The clip begins in bright daylight with the character riding uphill through cobblestone streets alongside other riders, then transitions abruptly to a stormy night as the character continues through lantern-lit city streets and into the rural outskirts accompanied by a torch-bearing guard.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside road approaching historic city gates

agents.ego_description: riding uphill on a cobblestone road toward the city gates, alongside other mounted riders

notable_agents.action: mounted rider in blue clothing riding parallel to ego
mounted guard riding alongside on the right

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance to the city with red roof visible above
white stone marker pillar with red symbols
red and yellow vertical banners strung across the street
distant mountains visible beyond the city walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sunny approach to a historic city gate. The camera follows the character riding uphill on cobblestone roads alongside other mounted riders. Stone pillars mark the entrance as colorful banners hang overhead, with distant mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city center with covered archways, flower-lined streets, and open plazas

events.description: enters covered stone archway from open hillside into enclosed city streets
emerges from archway into sunlit plaza with central fountain and statue

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow cobblestone passages and emerging into plazas, passing pedestrians and flower vendors

notable_agents.action: child in white clothing running alongside the horse

entered.detail: shaded stone archway with hanging plants and flowers
bright yellow historic building with green shutters and ornate details
red and pink flowering bushes lining the street
purple flowering plants in stone planters
stone fountain in the middle of the plaza
tall stone monument with statue on pedestal
elaborate white stone building with columns and balconies

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shaded covered passage transitioning from the open hillside into the enclosed city center. The route winds through narrow cobblestone streets lined with flower beds and colorful townhouses, emerging into a sunlit plaza featuring a central fountain and statue. The architecture features ornate historic stone buildings with balconies and shutters.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy night ride through lantern-lit city streets transitioning to dark rural outskirts

events.description: abrupt transition from bright daylight to dark stormy night with teal-colored sky
passes through city exit gate into open countryside with scattered cottages and rural roads

agents.ego_description: riding through darkened streets accompanied by a torch-bearing guard, then continuing through rural roads alone

notable_agents.action: armored guard running alongside holding a lit torch to illuminate the path

entered.detail: dark teal storm clouds covering the night sky with ominous green hue
warm yellow light glowing from building windows
ornate iron lanterns mounted on building walls casting warm light
large stone archway marking the city boundary with heavy wooden doors
small stone houses with lit windows in the countryside
arched stone bridge over a dark ravine

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly shifts to a stormy night with a dark teal sky. The character rides through narrow city streets illuminated by warm lantern light and glowing windows, accompanied by a torch-bearing guard. After passing through the city exit gate, the environment opens into dark rural countryside with scattered cottages and a stone bridge, the path lit only by the guard's torch and occasional street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a historic city that transforms from a bright, sunny afternoon into a stormy, lantern-lit night. It begins with an uphill ride on cobblestone roads toward a city gate adorned with colorful banners and distant mountains. As the camera moves forward, the open hillside gives way to a shaded covered passage and narrow streets lined with flower beds, eventually emerging into a sunlit plaza featuring an ornate fountain and statue. The scene then abruptly shifts to a dark teal stormy night, where the character navigates narrow city streets illuminated by warm lanterns and the flame of a torch-bearing guard. Finally, the path leads through the city exit gate and opens into a dark rural countryside of scattered cottages and a stone bridge, lit only by the flickering torchlight.
